title: KV-cache decode correctness integration test
description:
Create `tests/integration/kvcache_decode.rs` that verifies KV-cache-based generation produces identical output to full-recompute generation.

Test cases:
1. Generate 20 tokens with KV-cache path (forward_prefill + forward_one loop)
2. Generate 20 tokens with old full-recompute path (forward on all tokens each step)
3. Assert token IDs are IDENTICAL (bit-exact, not approximate)
4. Assert KV-cache values at each position match full forward K/V values within 1e-6
5. Test with deterministic seed for reproducibility
6. Test with varying prompt lengths (1 token, 8 tokens, 128 tokens)

Also create `tests/benchmarks/kvcache_speedup.rs`:
- Measure decode throughput: cached vs recompute at 64 generated tokens
- HARD threshold: cached ≥ 10× faster than recompute
- Memory check: KV-cache ≤ 50 MB for Qwen3-0.6B 2048 ctx

**Tests:** Both files ARE the tests.
